description:
*Features*:

  • *Three-Fingertips Touch Design*:High-sensitivity conductive yarn embedded in the touch screen gloves thumb,index finger,and middle finger fingertips,touch is more sensitive. Note:Please be sure to wear to the top of each finger,especially the 3 touchscreen fingers.
  • *Practical Winter Gloves*:With the sensitive touchscreen fingers capability,these gloves fit for smartphone,tablet,computer and other intelligent equipment to freely text,type,play games,click smart watch and GPS panel of cars even in cold winter.
  • *Exquisite Knitted Design*:Made of premium acrylic,our well-made knitted winter gloves are soft and comfortable for you to wear. Breathable material allows the gloves to ventilate in order to decrease sweat accumulation. Note:Spot wash by hand in warm water with mild detergent. Hang to dry. Do not use hot water. Do not put in dryer.
  • *Wide Applications*:Suitable for wearing in cold weather for indoor and outdoor activities,such as working,reading,running,cycling,hiking,camping,etc. in winter. Keep your hands warm in cold winter activities.
  • *A Great Gift In Winter*:Our Unisex Warm Winter Touch Screen Gloves are perfect gifts for friends and families in cold winter!

*Specifications*:

  • Product Type: Winter Touch Screen Gloves
  • Color: Black
  • Material: 95% Acrylic, 5% Elasthane
  • Item Size: 4.72ｘ9.84ｘ0.79 Inches
  • Item Weight: 0.18 lbs
  • Package Size: 11×4.5×3cm/4.33×1.77×1.18in
  • Package Weight: 82g/0.18lbs 

*Package Lists*:

  • 1Pair x Winter Touch Screen Black Gloves
